title: Tel #8512
definition:
Tel-abib = "mound of the flood"

 1) a city in Babylon, the home of the prophet Ezekiel, located on the
    river Chebar which was probably a branch of the Euphrates
nasbUsage:

 1) a city in Babylon, the home of the prophet Ezekiel, located on the
